title: Keto Chicken Tagine with Savory Flavors
description: A delicious and savory chicken tagine recipe for the keto diet, blending sophisticated flavors with traditional portuguese spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it's translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger; cook for another minute.
Add the chicken pieces and cook until they're browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the chicken broth, cinnamon, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the whipped coconut cream and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the sauce has thickened.
Serve the chicken and sauce hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
